params.TriggerDescription: Whenever equipped creature dies, exile it.

params.AddKeyword: Flying & First Strike & Double Strike & Deathtouch & Haste & Hexproof & Indestructible & Lifelink & Menace & Protection & Reach & Trample & Vigilance
params.Description: As long as a card exiled with CARDNAME has flying, equipped creature has flying. The same is true for first strike, double strike, deathtouch, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, protection, reach, trample, and vigilance.
